rulings.Case Title: EDWIN SPURLING VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, November 20, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PORTLAND CEMENT COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment is denied. Triable issue re exposure due to Mr. Spaulding¿s declaration. D¿Amico objection is overruled. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: EICON INC VS WORLDPOINT INTERACTIVE INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To X-Complainants' First Cause Of Action; And Declaratory Relief Related Thereto
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, November 20, 2009, line 2, CROSS DEFENDANT MASSIMO FUCHS Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Cross-Complainants' First Cause Of Action; and Declaratory Relief Related Thereto. Motion for judgment on the pleadings is denied. A party may plead inconsistent theories. The arguments raised for the first time in the reply memorandum were not considered. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: SEIKI OKADA et al VS. GREEN TREE FINANCIAL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, November 20, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT GREEN TREE SERVICING LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
